title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 191.025 - Health care compact
text:
191.025.  Health care compact. — The Health Care Compact is enacted into law and entered into by the state as a party, and is of full force and effect between the state and any other states joining therein in accordance with the terms of the Compact, which such Compact is as follows:
(L. 2011 H.B. 423)
